checklist.steps: Enter DOB, enter valid HH:MM, choose birth place, generate result.
checklist.expected: Output shows active reflective result with exact_session_only birth-time basis.

checklist.steps: Enter DOB, tick I don’t know exact birth time, choose birth place, generate result.
checklist.expected: Output shows exact birth time not known and uses unknown-time basis.

checklist.steps: Enter DOB and leave HH:MM blank or invalid without ticking unknown.
checklist.expected: Output falls back safely to pending_or_invalid basis.

checklist.steps: Select Itanagar, New Delhi, Ranchi and Tokyo in Panchang.
checklist.expected: Active calculated Panchang pilot result displays for approved pilot locations.

checklist.steps: Inspect copy and browser storage/network manually.
checklist.expected: No personal data storage, backend call, Supabase call or deterministic prediction.
